name: Pullman Phuket Panwa Beach Resort
address: 44/5 Moo 8 Sakdidesh Road, Vichit, Mũi Panwa, Phuket, Thái Lan
description:
Pullman Phuket Panwa Beach Resort - Kỳ quan nghỉ dưỡng 5 sao tại Phuket, Thái Lan

Pullman Phuket Panwa Beach Resort là một kỳ quan nghỉ dưỡng 5 sao nằm tại thành phố Phuket, Thái Lan. Với vị trí lý tưởng, kỳ quan nghỉ dưỡng này chỉ cách trung tâm thành phố 5 km, mang đến sự yên tĩnh và tĩnh lặng cho khách hàng. Với 211 phòng nghỉ, Pullman Phuket Panwa Beach Resort đảm bảo rằng khách hàng sẽ có nơi lưu trú thoải mái và tiện nghi. Khách hàng có thể thoải mái nghỉ ngơi và tận hưởng không gian riêng tư trong các phòng nghỉ được thiết kế đẹp mắt và sang trọng.

Khách hàng có thể thoải mái nhận phòng từ 02:00 PM và trả phòng trước 12:00 PM. Điều này mang lại sự linh hoạt cho khách hàng trong việc điều chỉnh thời gian lưu trú của mình. Với việc xây dựng từ năm 2009 và được cải tạo lần cuối vào năm 2016, Pullman Phuket Panwa Beach Resort mang đến cho khách hàng những tiện nghi hiện đại và tiêu chuẩn cao cấp.

Khách hàng cũng không cần lo lắng về việc di chuyển đến sân bay vì kỳ quan nghỉ dưỡng này chỉ cách sân bay 45 phút. Điều này giúp khách hàng tiết kiệm thời gian và thuận tiện trong việc di chuyển. Đáng chú ý là Pullman Phuket Panwa Beach Resort không cho phép trẻ em lưu trú miễn phí. Có thể có các khoản phụ thu phụ thuộc vào chính sách của khách sạn.

Tiện nghi giải trí tại Pullman Phuket Panwa Beach Resort

Pullman Phuket Panwa Beach Resort tọa lạc tại Phuket, Thái Lan, và mang đến cho du khách một loạt các tiện nghi giải trí tuyệt vời. Khách sạn này có các cửa hàng đa dạng để bạn có thể mua sắm và tìm kiếm những món quà độc đáo. Bạn cũng có thể thư giãn và thưởng thức các loại đồ uống tại quầy bar của khách sạn. Nếu bạn muốn thư giãn và làm mới cơ thể, hãy trải nghiệm các liệu pháp massage, sauna và steamroom tại spa của khách sạn. Bên cạnh đó, khách sạn còn có khu vườn xanh tươi để bạn có thể thả mình vào không gian thiên nhiên tuyệt đẹp. Khách sạn cũng có phòng trò chơi, thư viện và khu vực chung với TV để bạn có thể thư giãn và tận hưởng thời gian nghỉ ngơi. Đừng quên ghé qua cửa hàng quà lưu niệm để tìm những món quà đặc biệt để mang về nhà.

Cơ sở vật chất thể thao tại Pullman Phuket Panwa Beach Resort

Pullman Phuket Panwa Beach Resort được trang bị đầy đủ các cơ sở vật chất thể thao để đáp ứng nhu cầu giải trí và rèn luyện sức khỏe của du khách. Khách sạn có trung tâm thể dục hiện đại, hồ bơi ngoài trời và bãi biển riêng, tạo điều kiện tuyệt vời cho việc tận hưởng các hoạt động ngoài trời. Ngoài ra, khách sạn còn cung cấp dịch vụ các môn thể thao nước không sử dụng động cơ, như đánh thuyền, chèo kayak và cho thuê thiết bị thể thao nước. Du khách còn có thể tham gia các hoạt động như bóng bàn, lướt ván buồm và tập yoga trong phòng riêng.

Tiện nghi tiện lợi tại Pullman Phuket Panwa Beach Resort

Pullman Phuket Panwa Beach Resort cung cấp nhiều tiện nghi tiện lợi để đáp ứng nhu cầu của khách hàng. Khách sạn có dịch vụ phòng 24 giờ, giúp bạn có thể yêu cầu dịch vụ phòng bất cứ lúc nào trong ngày. Bạn cũng có thể sử dụng dịch vụ giặt là và ủi đồ để giữ quần áo luôn sạch sẽ và ngăn nắp. 

Ngoài ra, Pullman Phuket Panwa Beach Resort còn cung cấp dịch vụ đặt phòng, giúp bạn có thể đặt phòng và kiểm tra tình trạng phòng một cách nhanh chóng và thuận tiện. Khách sạn cũng có két an toàn để bạn có thể lưu giữ đồ vật quý giá một cách an toàn. Wi-Fi miễn phí được cung cấp cả trong phòng và khu vực công cộng, giúp bạn luôn kết nối với thế giới bên ngoài. 

Nếu bạn là người hút thuốc, khách sạn cũng có khu vực chỉ định để hút thuốc. Để đáp ứng nhu cầu mua sắm hàng ngày, khách sạn còn có cửa hàng tiện lợi. Dịch vụ giữ hành lý, làm sạch phòng hàng ngày và lò sưởi cũng được cung cấp để đảm bảo bạn có một kỳ nghỉ thoải mái và tiện lợi tại Pullman Phuket Panwa Beach Resort.

Tiện nghi vận chuyển tại Pullman Phuket Panwa Beach Resort

Pullman Phuket Panwa Beach Resort cung cấp nhiều tiện nghi vận chuyển thuận tiện để đáp ứng nhu cầu của khách hàng. Khách sạn có dịch vụ đưa đón sân bay, giúp du khách dễ dàng di chuyển từ sân bay đến khách sạn một cách tiện lợi và nhanh chóng. Ngoài ra, khách sạn cũng có dịch vụ xe đưa đón miễn phí trong khu vực xung quanh, giúp du khách khám phá các điểm tham quan và mua sắm trong khu vực một cách dễ dàng. 

Nếu bạn muốn tự lái xe, Pullman Phuket Panwa Beach Resort cung cấp dịch vụ cho thuê xe, giúp du khách tự do khám phá thành phố. Khách sạn cũng có dịch vụ đỗ xe tự động và đỗ xe miễn phí, giúp du khách an tâm về việc tìm kiếm chỗ đỗ xe. Nếu bạn muốn đi lại bằng taxi, khách sạn cũng có dịch vụ đặt xe taxi để đáp ứng nhu cầu của khách hàng. Đồng thời, khách sạn còn có dịch vụ bán vé và tổ chức tour, giúp du khách dễ dàng tham gia các hoạt động thú vị trong khu vực.

Tiện nghi phòng tại Pullman Phuket Panwa Beach Resort

Pullman Phuket Panwa Beach Resort là một điểm đến lý tưởng cho những ai muốn tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ thú vị tại Phuket, Thái Lan. Khi lưu trú tại resort này, bạn sẽ được trải nghiệm những tiện nghi phòng hiện đại và tiện lợi. Mỗi phòng đều được trang bị máy lạnh để bạn có thể tận hưởng không gian thoáng đãng trong những ngày nắng nóng. Bên cạnh đó, bạn cũng sẽ tìm thấy các tiện ích như áo choàng tắm, máy sấy tóc và truyền hình. Nếu bạn muốn thư giãn trong phòng, mini bar được trang bị đầy đủ các loại đồ uống và đồ ăn nhẹ. Bạn cũng có thể thưởng thức không gian ngoài trời tại ban công/hiên nhà riêng của phòng. Ngoài ra, phòng còn có truyền hình vệ tinh/cáp, tủ lạnh và lò sưởi để bạn cảm thấy thoải mái và tiện nghi trong suốt kỳ nghỉ của mình.

Nhà hàng và tiện nghi ẩm thực tại Pullman Phuket Panwa Beach Resort

Pullman Phuket Panwa Beach Resort cung cấp một loạt các tiện nghi ẩm thực đa dạng để đáp ứng mọi nhu cầu của khách hàng. Khách sạn có dịch vụ phòng 24 giờ, quán cà phê và nhà hàng để khách hàng có thể thưởng thức các món ăn ngon ngay tại khu nghỉ dưỡng. Ngoài ra, khách sạn cũng có dịch vụ phòng, tiện nghi BBQ và dịch vụ dọn phòng hàng ngày để đảm bảo sự thoải mái và tiện nghi cho khách hàng. 

Khách sạn cũng cung cấp dịch vụ buffet sáng và bữa sáng kiểu châu Âu hàng ngày. Khách hàng có thể thưởng thức những món ăn tuyệt vời và đa dạng từ khắp nơi trên thế giới ngay tại khu nghỉ dưỡng. Với những tiện nghi ẩm thực đa dạng và chất lượng, Pullman Phuket Panwa Beach Resort là lựa chọn tuyệt vời cho những ai muốn trải nghiệm ẩm thực tại Phuket.

Các loại phòng tại Pullman Phuket Panwa Beach Resort

Pullman Phuket Panwa Beach Resort cung cấp nhiều loại phòng đa dạng để đáp ứng nhu cầu của khách hàng. Có sẵn các loại phòng như: Deluxe Room, 1 King Size Bed với diện tích 50 mét vuông và tầm nhìn ra biển; Deluxe Family Room với 1 giường King Size và 1 giường Sofa (Ban công) có diện tích 45 mét vuông; Deluxe Room, 1 King Size Bed với diện tích 50 mét vuông; Deluxe Room, 2 Single Size Beds với diện tích 50 mét vuông; Deluxe Room, 2 Single Size Beds, Sea View với diện tích 50 mét vuông; Deluxe Suite, 1 King Size Bed, Ban công hướng ra biển Andaman với diện tích 115 mét vuông; Junior Suite, một phòng ngủ với giường King Size và ban công rộng rãi với diện tích 70 mét vuông; Pool Villa Beachfront, 1 King Bed, chỉ vài bước chân đến bãi biển với diện tích 150 mét vuông; Pool Villa Garden View, 1 King Bed, một ốc đảo nhiệt đới để nghỉ ngơi với diện tích 150 mét vuông; Pool Villa Sea View, 1 King Bed, tận hưởng bình minh tuyệt đẹp nhất của hòn đảo với diện tích 150 mét vuông.

Khám phá Mũi Panwa - Thiên đường nghỉ dưỡng tại Phuket

Mũi Panwa là một trong những điểm đến nổi tiếng tại Phuket, Thái Lan, với vẻ đẹp hoang sơ và không gian yên tĩnh. Nằm cách trung tâm thành phố Phuket khoảng 10 km, khu vực này được bao bọc bởi những bãi biển trắng mịn và nước biển trong xanh. Pullman Phuket Panwa Beach Resort nằm tại Mũi Panwa, mang đến cho du khách một trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng tuyệt vời.

Với vị trí lý tưởng, Pullman Phuket Panwa Beach Resort là nơi lý tưởng để khám phá Mũi Panwa và các điểm tham quan lân cận. Du khách có thể dễ dàng tận hưởng không gian yên bình và tĩnh lặng của bãi biển Panwa, hoặc khám phá Khu du lịch Ao Yon - một trong những bãi biển đẹp nhất tại Phuket. Ngoài ra, khu vực này cũng có nhiều nhà hàng, quán bar và cửa hàng mua sắm để du khách thỏa sức khám phá văn hóa và ẩm thực độc đáo của địa phương.

Hướng dẫn đến Pullman Phuket Panwa Beach Resort từ sân bay gần Phuket

Pullman Phuket Panwa Beach Resort, tọa lạc tại Mũi Panwa, Phuket, Thái Lan, là một kỳ nghỉ lý tưởng để thư giãn và khám phá vẻ đẹp của đảo Phuket. Để đến được Pullman Phuket Panwa Beach Resort từ sân bay gần nhất, bạn có thể chọn một trong những phương tiện sau đây.

Một lựa chọn phổ biến là sử dụng dịch vụ taxi. Tại sân bay, bạn có thể tìm thấy nhiều công ty taxi đáng tin cậy. Hãy đảm bảo thỏa thuận giá cước trước khi lên taxi để tránh bất ngờ. Đường đi từ sân bay đến Pullman Phuket Panwa Beach Resort có khoảng cách khoảng 45 phút và bạn sẽ được trải qua những cảnh quan tuyệt đẹp của đảo Phuket.

Ngoài ra, bạn cũng có thể sử dụng dịch vụ xe đưa đón của khách sạn. Pullman Phuket Panwa Beach Resort cung cấp dịch vụ đưa đón từ sân bay với một khoản phí hợp lý. Bạn chỉ cần liên hệ với khách sạn trước để đặt dịch vụ này và nhân viên của khách sạn sẽ đón bạn tại sân bay và đưa bạn đến kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời của mình.

Khám phá những điểm đến nổi tiếng xung quanh Pullman Phuket Panwa Beach Resort

Nằm tại vị trí đắc địa, Pullman Phuket Panwa Beach Resort là điểm khởi đầu lý tưởng để khám phá những điểm đến nổi tiếng xung quanh. Dạo quanh khu vực, du khách sẽ không thể bỏ qua những điểm đến hấp dẫn như Bảo tàng Cá Phuket, Thác Ton Ao Yon (thác cao nhất), Super cheap 24h, Khao Kad, Ao Chalong, View point, Tarzan adventure, Mũi Panwa, Thác Ton Aow Yon và Trung tâm Sinh học biển Phuket. 

Bảo tàng Cá Phuket là một điểm đến thú vị cho những ai yêu thích động vật biển. Du khách có thể khám phá và tìm hiểu về đa dạng sinh học biển thông qua các bể cá đầy màu sắc và các buồng trưng bày độc đáo. Thác Ton Ao Yon là điểm đến lý tưởng cho những ai muốn thư giãn và tận hưởng không gian thiên nhiên tươi đẹp. Với độ cao lớn nhất, thác nước truyền thống này sẽ mang đến cho du khách những trải nghiệm tuyệt vời. Super cheap 24h là nơi mua sắm lý tưởng để tìm kiếm những món đồ hấp dẫn với giá cả phải chăng. 

Khám phá những điểm đến này và nhiều hơn nữa khi lưu trú tại Pullman Phuket Panwa Beach Resort, nơi mang đến cho du khách một trải nghiệm kỳ nghỉ đáng nhớ.

Những nhà hàng xung quanh Pullman Phuket Panwa Beach Resort

Pullman Phuket Panwa Beach Resort nằm gần nhiều nhà hàng phục vụ các món ăn đa dạng và ngon miệng. Các lựa chọn bao gồm Cafe Kantary, Lae lay @khao-khad, CHA SUN MOON, Baan Ra Tree Restaurant, Treetop Restaurant, Baba Hot Box, Panwa bar, Green mango restaurant (Halal), Panwa House, Cape Panwa, Phuket, và Noi's Happy Place. Tại đây, bạn có thể thưởng thức các món ăn đa quốc gia, từ ẩm thực Thái Lan truyền thống đến các món ăn quốc tế phong phú. Những nhà hàng này đều nằm gần khu vực nghỉ dưỡng, giúp bạn dễ dàng khám phá ẩm thực độc đáo của vùng đất Phuket.

Giá phòng trung bình tại Pullman Phuket Panwa Beach Resort so sánh với giá phòng trung bình tại thành phố Phuket

Pullman Phuket Panwa Beach Resort là một kỳ quan nghỉ dưỡng tuyệt vời tại Phuket, Thái Lan. Với giá phòng trung bình là $207, nơi này mang đến cho du khách một trải nghiệm đáng nhớ và đáng giá. So với giá phòng trung bình tại thành phố Phuket là $133, Pullman Phuket Panwa Beach Resort có giá cao hơn một chút. Tuy nhiên, sự đáng giá của nơi này không thể phủ nhận. Với dịch vụ chất lượng, tiện nghi hiện đại và vị trí tuyệt đẹp bên bờ biển, Pullman Phuket Panwa Beach Resort là sự lựa chọn hoàn hảo cho những ai muốn trải nghiệm kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời tại Phuket.

Kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời tại Pullman Phuket Panwa Beach Resort

Pullman Phuket Panwa Beach Resort là một khách sạn tuyệt đẹp với đội ngũ nhân viên thân thiện. Tôi rất thích kỳ nghỉ ở đây và chắc chắn sẽ quay lại lần sau! Cơ sở vật chất của khách sạn rất tuyệt vời và nhân viên rất thân thiện và hỗ trợ. Khách sạn ấn tượng với tầm nhìn tuyệt vời. Nhân viên rất đẹp và dịch vụ tốt. Chắc chắn sẽ ghé thăm lại! Phòng sạch sẽ, rộng rãi với tầm nhìn đẹp. Tôi rất thích tất cả nhân viên ở đó. Hồ bơi rộng lớn và tuyệt vời, với tầm nhìn đẹp. Vị trí tuyệt vời và dịch vụ tốt.

Pullman Phuket Panwa Beach Resort: Kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời với đánh giá cao từ khách hàng

Pullman Phuket Panwa Beach Resort là một điểm đến tuyệt vời cho kỳ nghỉ ở Phuket, Thái Lan. Khách sạn này đã nhận được đánh giá tích cực từ khách hàng với tổng điểm 8.5 trên 10. Điểm số này cho thấy sự hài lòng của khách hàng với chất lượng dịch vụ tại khách sạn.

Khách hàng đánh giá Pullman Phuket Panwa Beach Resort với điểm số 8.5 cho giá trị. Điều này chứng tỏ khách sạn không chỉ cung cấp dịch vụ tốt mà còn mang lại giá trị tuyệt vời cho khách hàng. Với mức giá hợp lý, khách sạn này đáng giá mỗi đồng bạn bỏ ra.

Khách sạn cũng nhận được điểm số cao với 8.7 cho tiện nghi và 8.9 cho sự sạch sẽ. Với các tiện ích hiện đại và được bảo quản cẩn thận, Pullman Phuket Panwa Beach Resort mang đến trải nghiệm thoải mái và tiện nghi cho khách hàng. Đội ngũ nhân viên tại khách sạn cũng nhận được điểm số cao với 8.9 cho hiệu suất làm việc, cho thấy sự chuyên nghiệp và tận tâm của họ đối với khách hàng.

sample_comments.title: The place to be for families
sample_comments.positives:
This was an amazing stay.
We loved our room with sea view (sunrise facing), the breakfast selection, the kind staff.
This is definitely a hotel built around families; there were so many small kids and the staff was super helpful towards all parents. Our 5 months old was treated wonderfully, we had no stress and there were stroller friendly ways to get anywhere. If you're a young couple looking for Phuket vibrant scene, this is not the hotel for you as it is far away from town, but if you are a family wanting to relax, this IS the place to be.
sample_comments.negatives: Not a problem for us, but the beach is tidal, so there are times when the sea is receding. Honestly for us it was a plus, it was wonderful for sunrises walks. The hotel is far away from town, but there are few nice massages and restaurants outside!

sample_comments.text: Tôi cho điểm tối đa không trừ điểm nào cả. Nơi ở rất đẹp, có view tốt, hồ bơi lớn, yên tĩnh, sát biển có thể xuống chơi ở bãi biển luôn. Nhân viên phục vụ rất tốt, chăm sóc khách hàng rất chu đáo. Còn có bất ngờ sinh nhật nữa, tôi rất thích.

sample_comments.title: Very nice hotel in a quiet location
sample_comments.text: we stayed at this hotel on the first week of april. it was near easter and we expected a lot of people in the hotel. it turned out that the 3 pools were not crowded as we had expected. it was also easy for us to get a table at breakfast. we were a party of 9 and we booked 2 radisson suites and 2 junior suites through agoda. on arrival, 2 suites were upgraded to pool villas and this turned out to be a great experience for the kids. although the kids did play at the kid's pool with waterslides, they preferred to spend most of the time in our own private swimming pool which was big enough for my two young kids. the 2 junior suites we had were of different layouts but both were big and comfortable with a big terrace/balcony. the breakfast buffet was nice with good choices. we only tried aqua restaurant during our stay and food was acceptable but not impressive. like other travellers, we found that the restaurants nearby served better food with much lower prices. overall, the hotel was very nice and well maintained and i would recommend this hotel to travellers who want to enjoy the quiet side of phuket.
sample_comments.positives: Quiet location, suite size, swimming pool

sample_comments.title: Horrible experience
sample_comments.text:
Radisson blu is an absolute disappointment for my family. I will let all my friends know of the horrible experience I have been having since our arrival yesterday at Radisson Phuket and the inadequate behavior of your staff. I have booked our holiday at a 5str brand name hotel hoping to have the peace of mind with my 5 mths old baby. The airport transfer with a specifically requested private car and a baby seat was arranged and confirmed 5 days prior arrival with the hotel directly. Upon arrival not only that they came with a van instead, but also the driver did not have any baby seat. I had no choice but to take an hour ride compromising my baby safety, crying and feeling hopeless. My request to the driver since the airport was that I need to see the manager immediately on arrival and I would like for them to explain to me what went wrong and what are they going to do about it. He promised me that the manager will wait for us at our arrival. This is where I have got to discover the even bigger mess at this resort. There was no manager on duty at 8.40 pm on a Thursday night. For over 90 min I have been crying and trying to understand why they don't take my request seriously. I didn't ask for flowers in my room or anything special....My request was super simple - safety for my child. The only person available was a receptionist that was insisting that she was a manager but failed to provide me with her business card and has also admitted during our conversation later that she has no decision making abilities. I have argued that I need to speak to her boss but apparently they have left the hotel and went home. I asked her to call the Executive Assistant Manager but she didn't even answer her phone. Then asked to speak to the General Manager but apparently he was not there either. 
Hotel itself is 3 stars and 1 hour from airport. Food is average.

sample_comments.title: Horrible staff, mold in room, but nice resort area
sample_comments.text:
i came in late to this hotel. the ride from the airport is very long and expensive for thailand.
to get into any civilization area is expensive, but to be secluded may be worth it.
the shuttle charges for everything.

now for the real complaints!
the room had mold and i had to leave early, the upkeep for a beach location to prevent mold is high. having lived in malibu, ca i know this better than anyone. they fail at this. 
when i told them about the mold, they did not offer a new room or even offer to address the issue. when i first walked in i said to the guy that had walked me to my room "this smells like mold" he went straight to the balcony and opened to door without addressing the issue. since i came in late i was tired and went to sleep. the next day i woke up and saw mold everywhere. as well as bubbling on the paint in the wall that was probably more mold. i went to the front desk and tried to be polite and just say i was unhappy and that i would like to cancel my remaining reservation. the lady at the front sitting at the managers desk did not offer me another room or a solution. she said no problem, so i figured they knew that this was an issue. then began the "dramatics" it was currently around 7:00am and i had a tour that i needed to be at by 8:30 and was 45 minutes away. long story short, i missed my prepaid tour, i spent an hour taking pictures of the mold instead of just leaving and when i left i had no idea if i was getting reimbursed or not. 
they have a 100% satisfaction guarantee that is total crap! this experience and hotel was horrible.
sample_comments.positives: gorgeous pool and beach area

sample_comments.text: It is so bad that they let us to bring our own luggage to room without buggy support. Never happened with other resort. We complained and they said that we need to request this service after checkin completion
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mr. Duc, Thank you for sharing your feedback. We apologize for the inconvenience you experienced with reception service and the buggy service during your recent stay. We understand that arriving at your room with luggage can be challenging, and we regret that our reception team did not meet your expectations immediately. To clarify, our buggy service operates on a queue basis to ensure that all guests receive timely assistance. This means that while we strive to accommodate everyone promptly, there may be wait times during peak periods. We also request that guests request buggy service after check-in completion to help us manage and prioritize the service efficiently. However, we understand that this process may not have been communicated effectively, and we will address this with our team to improve clarity and ensure better service in the future.Thank you again for your feedback. We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back in the future.
Best regards, Katekanok Suebsak

sample_comments.title: Pullman Panwa Phuket is one of my blacklist hotel.
sample_comments.text:
Pullman Panwa Phuket is one of my blacklist hotel. I feel very sick and uncomfortable even before I arrive Phuket.

I requested quiet room. Although the first room that I stay was amazing view, but during the night it very noisy as this room next to the bar.

I requested to change the room and it took more than 30 min to get back to me as they said they need to check with the manager. I dont understand I requested to change the room because of noise, why your staff make it so difficult? I request to change room with the same type. I end up need to walk to the reception area to follow up. After move to second room, 3 hours in bloody sweat because the air-con not working and again need to move as I was very sick then I end up need to sit on the wheelchair and move to the new room third time.

The first night that I stay in Pullman Panwa, I move 3 times start from 8 pm until almost 1 AM !!! What a joke!!!

sample_comments.title: absolutly dont stay there hotel
sample_comments.text: this hotel in the middle of nowhere is an absolute "dont stay there" hotel. was looking for a beach vacation with child. this hotel is on an very small beach where the water is so shallow that even you walk 100 meter into the sea the water is only until your knees..how you can swimm there..? if you think the pool is better than you wrong..only 1,10 meter deep its always only until your tummy..also not realy fun to swimm and beside of it a shallow pool like that get very warm, the pool feeled like an warm bathtap. the kids club a joke, only for babies and nothing for a 10 year old child. the first room we had smelled so horrible from the drainage that we changed on the next day. you think it got better..wrong..in the other room the drainage always overflow when you shower and the bathroom floor is full of water..the couldnt fix that problem because i think flooding in that hotel is an problem due to the dumb construction. also the CR and locker room at the pool was flooded kneedeep after an rain. the stuff is lousy in english and not realy friendly. the only thing what was ok was the food. i realy got frustrated at that hotel with all there lack of skills and attention. at the pool there are 2 guys at the towel station, you think they would put the towels at your folding chair..no they sit at the floor and play chatting. the folding chairs..my god what a crap..old, wood and very heavy, the umbrellas more an decoration than a sunprotection..fazit..if you want a beach vacation stay at another place and another hotel.

sample_comments.title: Overal nice but rather dull
sample_comments.text:
The location and hotel itself are rather dull. The hotel grounds and view are nice but not really of the breathtaking romantic sort.

The oil refinery as neighbour means some industrial boat traffic and anyway the beach isn't really pleasant. There is some construction work closeby as well.

We rented a Pool Villa. The first room we were shown probably sanctioned our choice to reserve through Agoda as the view was 2% ocean and 50% machinery room: dark, noisy and gloomy. Every towel was dodgy as well, old and stained.

We asked for a better location and were moved (3 hours later) to a more pleasant villa where we could definitely enjoy the pool and patio. The floor didn't seem very clean but it was overal nice. Even the towels were cleaner, strangely.

Activities: not that much to do really, the beach gets dirtier the further you walk from the hotel and the watersports hut offers only kayaking which is restricted to a tiny band of water.

The Spa is very nice but a massage there will cost you 7 times the price of a similar massage right outside the hotel. 

The food is good quality for the money compared to what many would think. The restaurants outside cater only for tourists: cheap but low quality and service and no charm whatsoever. There is a nice little hippie bar just off the hotel.

Service is quite uneven, sometimes very good like at the Azur restaurant, sometimes distracted or sad.

In short, while we didn't have a bad time I wouldn't see a valid reason to return as many details that should be better sorted in a 5 star accomodation bothered me throughout the stay.
sample_comments.positives: Large room (pool villa)

sample_comments.title: Beautiful Hotel but not organized
sample_comments.text:
generally it was a beautiful hotel but the staff were not well educated especially in the reception and the restaurant. 
it had a beautiful view but the location of the hotel was a little too far from everything. the transportation arranged by the hotel was too expensive and it would have been nice if there was more complimentaory transportation to and from the airport as well as other beaches. 
it was a boring place for the kids after 3 days beacuse there was nothing else to do except swimming.not really a place for family with kids.
sample_comments.positives: Good food and beautiful view

sample_comments.title: Sub-par experience. Mid tier resort.
sample_comments.text: I consider myself someone who enjoys nicer resorts. While the staff was pleasant, what I saw online did not depict the quality of this stay. The amenities seemed unsanitary, the tv was outdated and did not work as needed, the shower had a displeasing scent upon arrival, & the all around condition of the resort was a bit ran down. My wife had sat at breakfast after a work out in a sports bra and leggings (nothing that was revealing, no cleavage showing) she was ultimately sent back to our room while enjoying breakfast and told she needed to change or put a jacket on??? It's 95° out, I thought this was ridiculous as people were laying out by the pool no more than 20 meters away from where we were sat. While I understand this is not and adult only resort it was hard to enjoy the amenities given there were kids all over the place which was okay but generally an annoyance while at the pool and trying to enjoy breakfast. My idea was that I would be enjoying a luxurious stay, this was far from it. If you are interested in enjoying a calm get away with your significant other I would consider other options.

Breakfast is not as good as other five stars chain hotel but it is sufficient if you do not expect much. For room, it is good size and clean but "old fashioned." I booked Deluxe seaview room of which its view is stunning.

For the promo price I paid, I must stay it is not so bad. But it could be better.

sample_comments.title: extremely rude staff,worst breakfast in Thailand
sample_comments.text: Cape panwa is nice but not this property. We made specific room requests and they fail to deliver their promise. There are several pleasant staff but we had very bad encounter with extremely rude local staff from their restaurants and poolside. Service standard is like a 2 star Budget hotel. Fine dining Restaurant was understaffed constantly which makes the waiting Long and unpleasant. Worst breakfast selection in Thailand ever. They can't even cook a nice local dish for breakfast. Selection for the breakfast needs to be improved as they serve almost the same horrible food every day. Even the tables at the breakfast table was stinky.....worst hygiene level. We gave feedback about our stay, but all they do is apologise, they should have done more to appease their guests who were there to relax instead of creating unpleasant situations! Staff at the pool towel counter was very racist to Asian guests as he refuse to heed to our extra towel requests while he was more than happy to give extra towels to non-Asian guests, extremely rude and blunt! Will not be back and will not recommend this resort! Avoid at all cost!
sample_comments.positives: Grounds are nice when it is high tide, location cape panwa is serene and calm for relaxation, but the staff created some stressful situations that made the trip unpleasant.

sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.positives: The location of the property. All staff members. Chef Raju, who tried well to accommodate our vegetarian requirement with the limited resources. Very good environment friendly overall approach. App based services request system is very convenient and prompt response.
sample_comments.negatives: Property is highly dens, doesn't feel like a resort. Bathroom need complete upgradation, water logging was the issue , after complain also it was not attended. Bed Mattress was not good, they did some wrap-up with the promise of room change but it didn't work or happen.

sample_comments.title: Bad start to our holiday!
sample_comments.text: After traveling from Johannesburg we finally arrived at the Radisson Blue only to be told that there were no rooms available. We eventually found out that a large group of Russians had arrived with extra bodies and to keep to group happy they gave our rooms away before we arrived. Eventually they moved us to the Westin Hotel 20 mins away where we spent one night. So we checked out the next day and drove back to the Radisson, checked in etc... We could have been relaxing instead we were still unpacking. They gave us a free massage at the Spa. The location of this hotel isnt great. No beach.

sample_comments.title: Met friends for a long weekend reunion. Good hotel
sample_comments.text: We had a lovely few days here. The pool and beach access were great! We had one of the best massages at the spa. Would highly recommend indulging in a massage during your stay. We were disappointed the morning we left as we had booked a taxi to the airport to leave at 6am and the driver was late which made our timing to catch our flight quite tight. There are a few places to eat across the road but for anything else you are a 30 min taxi ride away. Over all a good relaxing few days.
sample_comments.positives: the pool, good access to the beach and an amazing spa!

sample_comments.title: Not for me
sample_comments.text:
Unfortunately due to the tidal beach or what felt like a lagoon to me is why I would not stay here again. The food at the pool bar was unimpressive and the drinks not cold enough etc and the service too slow. You need to factor in that it costs more if you have to travel to the better beaches in other parts of Phuket and then buy a sunbed etc. 

The breakfasts were good and varied choice. Some lovely healthy options too. The staff try hard but for me this hotel definitely falls short of a 5 star rating in terms of its interiors, pokey lift, horrible brown tiles on the floor in the entrance of your room and old and dated doors etc. The products in the bathrooms were good and the beds and linen were comfortable and good enough. They do try hard but I would not stay here again because I am probably just too fussy. Stayed in the deluxe ocean view room. Don't want to be too negative so on a positive if you want to be away from the hustle and bustle then maybe you would it enjoy it here as at least it is a little peaceful and I enjoyed the beautiful sunrises I was privileged enough to witness.

Wish the hotel and its well meaning staff well. Such a lovely welcome from the check in guy. Best wishes.
sample_comments.room_type: DELUXE ROOM, 1 King Size Bed, Sea View

sample_comments.title: A sweet escape
sample_comments.text: Pullman Phuket Panwa offers a remote, tranquil escape from city noise and nightlife. While the facilities show their age, the resort is undergoing renovations to revitalize amenities. The secluded location on Phuket's southeastern tip provides a serene haven surrounded by lush greenery and the Andaman Sea. However, the remoteness also means limited access to Phuket's lively attractions. Perfect for those seeking solitude and rejuvenation, but travelers craving an action-packed vacation may want to look elsewhere. Overall, if you prioritize peace and quiet over excitement, this resort could be an ideal choice once renovations are complete.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Ms. Cheng,

Thank you for sharing your detailed feedback with us. We appreciate your thoughtful review of our resort.

We are pleased to hear that you comfortable with the hotel location and tranquil atmosphere of our resort, providing an escape from the hustle and bustle of city life. Overall, if you prioritize peace and quiet over excitement, this resort could be an ideal choice once renovations are complete.

The hotel and rooms have seen better days and were average, but the biggest disappointment was the pool as it was way to warm and wasn't refreshing at all. sample_comments.response:
Thanks for taking the time to post valuable feedback about your recent vacation in Phuket, Thailand.

We are sorry to discover you did not feel you received value for money when you stayed at our resort. While we completed a refurbishment of all guest rooms 11 months ago using a chic modern design and colour palate, we still kept our room rates below $150 USD during October. sample_comments.title: Overall, our experience did not meet our expectations.
sample_comments.positives: cleanliness
sample_comments.negatives: We experienced significant noise during our stay due to ongoing construction. When we requested a room change, we were moved to a location near the pool, which was adjacent to the kids' area. Unfortunately, this was quite noisy for us. Overall, our experience did not meet our expectations.

sample_comments.title: Just ok... nothing special.
sample_comments.text: The hotel is ok, but not at the price they are charging. The breakfast was a good example -- everything they had was good quality, but there was not as big a selection as other hotels at this price range. The pool area is ok too, but nothing special. The beach is on the bay and not the ocean, which is good for kids since it is shallow and calm. The wifi worked great in the room though, so we were thankful for that!

sample_comments.title: Great stay with AMAZING food! The staff was very kind at all times...
sample_comments.positives:
I recently had the pleasure of staying at the Pullman Panwa Hotel in Phuket, and it was an experience to remember. From the moment we arrived, the service was top-notch. A special shout-out to Atchi, who was incredibly helpful and kind during our check-in process, making us feel instantly at home.

The food was an absolute highlight---beyond excellent! Congratulations to the sublime chef, Mr. Kauder, whose culinary creations were both delicious and beautifully presented. Every meal was a delight, showcasing a perfect balance of flavors that left us eager for the next dish.

The hotel's location was serene and picturesque, offering a peaceful retreat away from the bustling city. It's also a very kids-friendly hotel, which is wonderful for families. However, for guests without children, it may take a few days to fully adapt to the lively atmosphere created by younger guests. While this wasn't a major issue, it's something to consider if you're seeking a more tranquil, adults-only environment.

One minor downside was the tide, which impacted the water clarity during our stay. Of course, this is entirely beyond the hotel's control and didn't detract from the overall beauty of the surroundings.

Overall, we had a wonderful and pleasant experience at Pullman Panwa and wouldn't hesitate to recommend it to anyone looking for a luxurious and relaxing getaway in Phuket.

sample_comments.title: Nearly there but "smile" not there
sample_comments.text:
The pool villas is worth every penny. We enjoyed it totally, especially the bathroom and the pool. The patio was just nice for family to sit around and share the moment and memories. 
The big pool was just superb in terms of size, water temperature and the facilities available.
The reception staff was nice and reflect the true Thailand, "land of the smiles".
The restaurant food quality was equal to any hotel of its class, but the smoothie of the day is only refill after the crowd left and the entire service and kitchen staff are Zombies to Asian or rather Chinese looking guest while the best of smiles and greetings plus service to causian guests. That is the biggest let down of the whole establishment and my experience of a near perfect resort. Even the pool attendant are smiling away and greeting everyone. I think it is the F&B issue, because the pool bar, staff also are the same as the restaurant in terms of attitude. By the way, we are not beggars, our money is equally a legal tender as any other guest in the hotel. 
The family mart across from the lobby has good selection of F&B to choose and convenient.
Transfer service provided by the 3rd party can be further improved in terms of service and not only looking to push guest to go on tours.
Raddisson Blu Plaza Resort Phuket, the Hardware are very good and impressive, but the software are the little things guests look for to have an amazing time with you. I think the management needs to really work on the service level of all your F&B out and staff attitude towards service. Just my two cents worth.

sample_comments.title: Good
sample_comments.text: We traveled for 2.5 weeks and Pullman was 1 of 7 hotels we visited. It was a 50/50 split for us. Positives- BEST lobby/view. You can't help but be awed by the beauty of the lobby and the view. It's really breathtaking. Great seating in lobby, pool areas, and dining area for breakfast. The room had the best lighting of any hotel we stayed- a plus for putting on makeup!. Negatives- the shower leaked all over, and I mean ALL over the floor, terrible design, the room layout was awkward and had lots of wasted space in the entry and hallway, the room was a hike to get to. Things that were good but didn't stand out- the staff was good, nothing great, nothing bad, the breakfast buffet was middle of the road out of our 7, and the location was ok, we got there when tide was out so the beach was not so great.
sample_comments.response:
Thanks for taking the time to provide valuable feedback on your recent stay our resort.

While we are pleased to discover you think the modern, open design of our lobby and the views from this area are the best you have seen, we are sorry to learn you were disappointed with the beach and quality of breakfast. Although the tide does go out for a few hours in the morning when the tide comes back the calm waters of the ocean that fronts our beach is a great place to relax or swim. Unlike the popular beaches on the other side of Phuket island there is no jelly fish or rip-tide and you don't have to share our private beach with thousands of other tourists. Also within a short walk of the hotel is an aquarium and an esplanade with market stalls open every night.

Once again thanks for your valuable feedback. 
Best wishes,
James Murphy

sample_comments.text: i really like the room with the beautiful ocean view .. and the hotel priveate beach is white sand , very clean and preacful ( better when tide up in the afternoon ) , just some problems with the hotel management ... some sun chairs r nearly broken ... and i tried to open my sunshade beach umbrella found out its broken with many huge holes nearly tear apart , so i asked thier staff to get me a new one instead . the breakfast is great .. but the food of the dinner buffet is not that good , and not a perfect place of u want a romantics dinner .. a bit too bright . all staff r very friendly and good service too. as fr the room .. everything is perfect .. but cleaning parts needs to b improved .. they seems didn't clean the floor well .. and found small bugs on the bedside table twice !! overall i really love the resort .. guess all these problem can b easily taken care and improved !! it's a quite and beautiful place .. i will fr sure want to come back again !!

sample_comments.title: Clean and beautiful resort with great pool
sample_comments.text:
Arrived resort with great surprise as they have upgraded our 2 Radisson Suite to pool villa. Very big room with good seaview. They have even provided a complementary rollaway bed for my 8 yrs old boy. King-size bed was comfortable and big enough for a couple and my 4 yrs old daughter. The pools are great too esp the slide pool enough to entertain my 2 kids for hrs, seaview pool is also perfect for relaxation. 
The only con abt our pool villa was that the Jacuzzi at the outdoor pool was not working. Called the hse keeping but no one turn up so was quite disappointed with their service. Resort is also far away from shopping area/town. Resort do provide free shuttle bus to Festive Ctr and Phuket town but limited schedule think only twice a day. Transport and tours at the resort is very expensive, suggest try the tour desk opp the resort for better bargain. Cheap massage also available opp the resort. Overall, beautiful resort for family with kids as is less crowded compare to the resorts at Patong.
sample_comments.positives: Big and clean room. Great pool.

sample_comments.title: Peaceful Hotel
sample_comments.text:
We had a 4 nights stay at this hotel. Check in was OK as we were allotted a wrong room which was then changed after we moved in.
Overall the place was peaceful and relaxing. One of the main points is that the hotel is a bit far away from the city and you usually spend around Baht (one way) to go to Central or Patong (free shuttle buses are also available with limited hours).
Breakfast was good but no fresh juices (a place which is in abundance with fresh fruits). The dinner buffet is quite expensive but considering it to be far away from city one doesn't have much options - specially in rainy season hotel dinning is the only option.
Don't rely on in room dining as options are quite limited. We had to order it as we arrived a bit late but just stuffed it.

It was a rainy season so didn't get the chance to explore the resort on the rainy days. Pools are nice and one can relax and have a good time there.

Overall, its a good place to stay as the staff is quite hospitable and you tend to relax a bit more as compared to staying in Patong.
sample_comments.positives: peaceful, relaxing

sample_comments.title: Great hotel, but a bit isolated
sample_comments.text:
Once you are there you feel at home. Especially the pool villas are outstanding. Service is good, rooms are clean and all infrastructures are well maintained.

On the downside, the beach is not suitable for quality time,
the taxi services are quite expensive and the place is isolated.

Thank you for sharing your feedback following your recent stay at Pullman Phuket Panwa Beach. We truly appreciate you taking the time to let us know about your dining experience.

We regret to hear that your dining experience a part of half board package did not fully meet your expectations, and we sincerely apologize for the inconvenience you encountered. We would like to explain that we regularly welcome many guests who follow a vegetarian diet, and our culinary team is well experienced in accommodating such preferences. As our restaurant offers a wide range of international cuisine, the menu is designed with variety and flexibility.

In addition to Thai and Italian selections, we are also pleased to offer authentic Indian food, prepared by our original Indian chef, who can create a variety of vegetarian Indian dishes upon request. For guests who enjoy Thai cuisine, we are happy to prepare vegetarian options such as fried rice, Pad Thai, and even our signature Tom

This hotel has a sleek and modern vibe, but getting to the deluxe rooms involves a bit of a hike. Unfortunately, the pool jacuzzi was out of order, and the beach wasn't ideal for swimming especially during low tide due to some smelly and slimy sand. There was also some hotel upgrade constructions going on. Despite these hiccups, they handled the ongoing construction pretty well, and it wasn't too disruptive. On the bright side, the breakfast selection was top-notch, the best I've had in Thailand so far! 

The Kids Club was a hit too with fun activities, especially thanks to Tanya, who was super patient with the rowdy kids. Shoutout to the friendly reception staff as well! Overall, despite a few bumps, it was a pretty solid stay.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Ms. ili,
Thank you for taking the time to share your experience with us. We appreciate your feedback. Regarding the inconvenience caused by the distance to the deluxe rooms, allow us to offer alternative room options for your next vacation with us. We have pool villas and pool villa sea view rooms, which feature private pools with jacuzzi and are conveniently located near the beach and the restaurant. We understand how these factors can impact your overall experience of the beach conditions during low tide. However, we'd like to suggest our "Marine Walk" activity to enjoy the marine environment during low tide.
We are delighted that you enjoyed our breakfast and the Kids Club was a hit, and we will certainly pass along your kind words to Tanya and our reception staff. Your compliments are a great motivation for our team. Thank you for your feedback. We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back in the future. 
Warm regards, Katekanok Suebsak. Guest Experience Manager

sample_comments.title: I would say a 3.5/5
sample_comments.text:
Pros: great breakfast with lots of variety and choices, large pool area, private beach, small selection of restaurants and massage places across the street, beautiful lobby area, large comfortable beds, easy app to order extra amenities for the room etc
Cons: 1 hour from the airport and 20 minutes into town. mosquitos in the room. service is very inefficient e.g. the receptionist who checks you in also walks you to your room and shows you around. This means reception is always understaffed and there are always queues. My initial room had water that ran brown, maintenance attended very quickly but proceeded to run the water for half an hour before eventually deciding they couldn't fix the problem. I then had to ask if I could just be moved to another room as this is all happening at 9:30 at night. From the point of reporting the problem to the point of being moved to another room the entire thing took an hour. Overall some maintenance of the public areas are needed as well. Just not really the level you would expect for a 5* hotel- still a way to go.

Check in was easy and the reception staff were very friendly. Our room wasn't ready when we arrived so we went to sit by the pool for a drink, the beer was hot and they had a very limited beer menu.
We stayed in a sea view pool room, it was very beautiful and big.
I found that the room was hot as the aircondioner has been set at 20 degrees and couldn't be turned down any further the room was quite expensive and not being comfortable really annoyed me.
Breakfast was ok but again expensive.
We had a track near our room that lead down to the beach, when we walked down there the area down our end of the beach was full of plastic bottles, old foam eskies, plastic bags etc, for a five star resort they should go along on that short stretch of beach and clean it up.
 We had room service and really enjoyed it, the portions were generous and unlike the restaurants the prices were very reasonable.
The day spa was divine! I had the best massage there that I've ever had in Thailand.
sample_comments.response:
Thanks for taking the time to let us know how much you liked the friendly service from our resort team.

We also wish to thank you for your valuable feedback on the quality of the beer and the size of our beer menu. Firstly I agree, a good beer is always best served cold so I wish to apologize for not delivering that important standard on this occasion. Our resort has 2 bars, the Edge Beach Club serves 2 local beers and 3 international beers; our Junction Bar has 2 local beers, 3 international beers and a choice of 6 craft beers.

We look forward to welcoming you back to beautiful Cape Panwa, Phuket in the future.

Best wishes,

sample_comments.title: relaxing
sample_comments.text:
Comfortable stay. Came with my girlfriend. The location is a bit far from Phucket town(around 20min) and Pattong. About 40-1hour away from the Airport. So if you are planning to visit the town frequently or surroundings you will have to spend quite a bit on transport. Phucket town is about 9-1200baht. The hotel car is more expensive, but just outside the hotel you can find someone to take you for cheaper. I stayed in a deluxe with no view. Room size was quite big enough. Clean, No complaints. Fast internet. 
Food/beverage is quite nice and reasonably priced for western standards. There is a convenient store across the road and few Restaurants and massage places but never tried them. Also a chemist type, which also shares with a tour/activity booking centre where you can book some day trips.

It is a resort, so expect sun baking, swimming, laying around. 
Staff are ok, don't seem that attentive, and smiling a lot. 

But overall, enjoyable and relaxing.

sample_comments.text:
during low tide you get the rare opportunity to wake on the sea bed and look for a variety of crabs, star fish, sea urchin, etc. 
if you wish to dip in the sea or go canoeing, best to do it at the first opportune time when the tides are in. during low tide, the sea is quite far away.
its away from town so great place to relax if your are a city dweller like myself.

From the moment we arrived the staff were friendly and attentive. We took advantage of the upgrade to Club level. We found the staff in the Club lounge very friendly and they did not hesitate to assist us with sightseeing questions and public transport questions. If they were not sure of the correct answer they went and found out. We would have no hesitation in being back to this hotel. We highly recommend this hotel.

There was not one fault that we could find with this excellent hotel.

sample_comments.title: Lovely hotel and nice location
sample_comments.text:
We began our honeymoon in this lovely hotel. The service was good and the rooms were comfortable and spacious. We can't really complain about too much here, the only annoyance was at times there was a language barrier with the staff and there were no fluent English speakers available. We enjoyed the large swimming pool by the beach and the free shuttle into Phuket town. We did think however it was a little bit stingy that we weren't allowed on the bus on our final day. 
We decided not to eat at their restaurants as they were truly over priced and we only had to cross the road to find a nice restaurant at a fraction of the price. 
Overall it was probably 4 star luxury at 5 star prices for Thailand.
sample_comments.positives: Quiet location

sample_comments.title: Beautiful, Comfortable, and a true getaway
sample_comments.text:
we selected this hotel during our 10 day visit of singapore and phuket celebrating our 3 year anniversary. we were very impressed by the secluded location of the hotel. the layout and design of the resort was just perfect for the short 2 days we spent on the eve and day of our anniversary.

however the fact remains and is known that the beach that this hotel lies on was very very far from what we wanted. the water is only visible during the "high tide" which is basically from noon to around 4 pm. before and after this time you will see a terrible view of what looks like a drought. the beach is also not kept well with some debris and garbage always around.

it is a lovely hotel with excellent accommodation and service, but as it is so far from everything and is ideal for a getaway, i recommend that you stay on one of the many many islands instead and enjoy a much better location with a flawless beach.
sample_comments.positives: Service, Swimming pool, food, Seclusion

sample_comments.title: Lovely hotel
sample_comments.text: We stayed a very pleasant and relaxing two nights. The sea view room was fantastic. Had a great view of the sea and the horizon. The room had a balcony with a day bed to relax and read a book. The infinity pool had jacuzzi corners that we lazed around the whole day. Kayaking is free during high tide. Definitely recommended place!
sample_comments.positives: sea view room had a great view

It was a 5 star experience albeit in some areas it seemed quite obvious that due to the lackof numbers of people who had been staying then some of the food, particularly at breakfast was not what it should have been. Some of the bread and danish were stale and the tea never seemed right either
sample_comments.positives: Excellent tranquility for those wwating peace and quiet

sample_comments.title: Great place with nice beach for children
sample_comments.text: Room was clean but has strong smell of sanitizer or chemical usage, staff said that they have to deep clean the shower room before we check in. However, we have enjoyed the beach a lot. Staffs are so nice. Food was good.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Khun Kitiya,

Thank you for shared your experience regarding your stay with us at Pullman Phuket Panwa Beach Resort. We are delighted to hear that you enjoyed our beautiful beach, especially for children, and that you found our staff friendly and the food enjoyable. It's wonderful to know these aspects helped make your stay pleasant.

We sincerely apologize for the strong smell in the room. Team performs a deep cleaning of the shower and bathroom areas before each guest check-in to ensure the highest hygiene standards, but the scent should never be overwhelming or uncomfortable. We appreciate you bringing this to our attention, and we will review our procedures to ensure better ventilation and balance between cleanliness and guest comfort.

Thank you once again for your valuable feedback. We hope to have the pleasure of welcoming you and your family back for an even more comfortable stay in the future.

Warm regards,
Katekanok S.
Guest Experience Manager

Dear Nusyl,

Thank you for sharing your thoughts about your recent stay with us. We are pleased to hear that you found our property clean and well-maintained.

We understand your concerns regarding the location. Our resort is designed to offer a serene and peaceful escape, which may feel a bit distant from bustling areas. For the price, we recommend exploring our various packages and promotions, available through our reservation team or on our website, to find excellent value for guests seeking a tranquil getaway.

Thank you again for your value feedback and choosing stay with us. We hope to have the pleasure of welcoming you again in the future, perhaps during a time when our offers best suit your plans.

Warm regards,
Katekanok Suebsak
Guest Experience Manager

Many massage parlours and minimarts just outside the resort.

If you want to do any of the island tours, easily book one with any of the vendors outside the hotel (remember to negotiate)

sample_comments.title: beach and swimming pool is so beautiful!
sample_comments.text:
The beach and swimming pool is so beautiful with very nice view. You can see sunrise at the morning. They have so many chair and bed beside beach and swimming pool, you can take a rest and relax at hotel whole day. You can see a little bit fish and crab at the beach. The sand is fine. The balcony have a big bed for your rest which is very nice. We're happy they upgraded our room and beside the swimming pool, we can swimming just go to balcony directly. 
We have order a pizza, it is very delicious and not expensive. It has 1 super market and 3 restaurants, local tour shop and exchange money shop at hotel opposite side. It is very convenient. 
The wifi is very good and strong. You can online at hotel everywhere. 
However, they don't have enough hot water for bath...The water is warm but not hot enough. It is cold when you bath at mid-night. The have 2 free shuttle bus for you go to town and central fastival at everyday. It is better to have 5- 6 shuttle bus ,and round trip at around 9pm - 10pm is much better. 
If they can provide the mosquito repellent incense at night time which is much better. There are mosquito at balcony. We can't go to balcony at night time.
sample_comments.positives: beach and swimming pool is so beautiful with very nice view. The room & wifi is very good.

The hotel environment is very beautiful and the staffs there are very nice. The room we stayed are clean and well condition. The only thing I dislike was that the room location we stayed, there was a tree in front of the balcony blocking the sea view and garden view. The sea side pool is very nice and we enjoyed to sit there and be relaxed.
The food at Aquo restaurant tasted good but quite expensive.
sample_comments.positives: Peaceful place for relax

sample_comments.text: Quiet and beautiful location far from Phuket's night life. Well equiped modern facility. Service is extremely friendly. Breakfast buffet is excellent and makes a stay more than worth. The somewhat expensive dinning needs imprvement. Five star rating well deserved. Transportation always available and very honnest and helpful. A very good hotel for demanding holidaymaker.

sample_comments.text: Good service, good food, reasonable size of room, good view.
sample_comments.positives: Nothing wrong..!

sample_comments.title: Nice getaway
sample_comments.text: The hotel has a nice view of the sea and the balcony was furnish so that you would be able to enjoy the scenery. The furnishing was well thought of and the perfect lounging chair was provided for in the balcony. The rooms are cosy and well furnished and maintained. The hotel is well situated away from the hustle and bustle of the city life. Perfect for just relaxing.
sample_comments.positives: The rooms were well furnished and cosy. Loved the lounging chair in the balcony.

sample_comments.text: As we had our daughter with us ,the place was rely for really old people or newly weds ,it's location is fantastic but to far away from shopping
sample_comments.positives: Breakfast fantastic

sample_comments.title: Great resort that would deserve a better beach
sample_comments.text:
this was my 3rd stay at the hotel which underlines that i generally like the hotel. rooms are nice with sufficient space on balcony and comfortable sofa to relax there. wooden floors add to the charm and tv-programs plus free wifi are a good standard. most room (except groundfloor) have sea view in my opinion, obviously with pools and villas in front of sea. nature is very well integrated in the concept of the setting.
the hotel has a gym and - what i like in particular - a well functioning dry sauna. 
in the years since existence of the hotel (3-4 years my guess) some annex infrastructure (shops, taxis and restaurant) has emgerged just outside the hotel, which is very convenient and saves some money on food and drinks if you like that.
unfortunately, in general the beach on this coast of phuket is not so great (tidal changes). if waves and sandy ground are your thing, you need to choose the west coast. however, the beach area is carefully arranged, it is just nature that denies a better beach experience.
sample_comments.positives: nice variety of pools and and landscape

sample_comments.title: Fantastic
sample_comments.text: rooms with a great view, very clean, very smiley and welcoming. great service. loved the parking attendants/situation, the guards took note of our car no matter what time we arrived at the hotel, they stopped traffic to help us get on to the main road. it was a bit far from the big beaches on the west coast, but it was a nice and tranquil setting, and the private beach was much nicer than the crowded ones on the west coast. yoga classes in the morning, kayaking at high tide. a paradise. very relaxing
sample_comments.positives: Beautiful setting, very clean

sample_comments.title: Private beach access + beautiful grounds
sample_comments.text:
this hotel is located a bit out of the ways which is what we seeked. the images on the web looks much better. the grounds + pools are great + full service amenities as expected. the staff are not overly friendly as one would expect but that's probably due to overworking + dealing with demanding tourists all day long.
good free kids club with crafts, nice gym + overall comfortable room.

the private beach was not clean + littered with debris so we didn't spend too much time down there.

the inclusive breakfast was good.
sample_comments.positives: Pool + decent breakfast

sample_comments.title: excellent service
sample_comments.text: thoroughly enjoyed our stay here. staff were friendly courteous , discreet and very professional. the only disadvantage was the distance away from alot of other attractions but if you just want a very nice break away then this is perfect
sample_comments.positives: service, cleanliness, friendliness of the staff, staff organisation

sample_comments.title: Great Hotel
sample_comments.text:
Excellent hotel. Got a upgrade to the pool villa without requesting it, was excellent. The beach is superb n kids enjoyed the water was calm and not deep. Food not so good with limited choice of authentic thai food. Excellent cocktails n good even in happy hour.
Overall a great choice to chill n enjoy the calm cool breeze n do nothing the whole day.
sample_comments.positives: pool villas are the best

sample_comments.title: Beach front Villa with private pool ... Fantastic
sample_comments.text: The service was good and the staff were friendly. But we did have a problem with one of the hotel taxi drivers trying to rip us off on a night out to Patong.

sample_comments.title: cozy place and amazing view
sample_comments.text: this hotel offers a cozy and well facilities both inside and outside the room. we were quite satisfied with the service and the hospitality from the staff. fine breakfast and romantic dinner provided so well. we enjoyed to spend our honeymoon here. but they just need to improve the English language for every staff, so that they may able to communicate well to the guest
sample_comments.positives: private beach and romantic dinner package

sample_comments.title: beautiful new hotel resort
sample_comments.text: the resort hotel is beautiful, just opened last year and brand new. rooms are stylish and spacious with bathroom views of the sea. the hotel is in a quite area with some shops just across the streets and some restaurants on the left side when leaving the hotel (10 min walk). It's a 20 min drive to Pattong and 15 min drive to Phuket town.
sample_comments.positives: facilities, clean rooms, brand new hotel
sample_comments.negatives: beach quite small and water not very deep

sample_comments.title: Comfortable Stay
sample_comments.text: A bit far from Patong, but that is a good thing for us. We came as a family so this remote area was fine. Took grab to Old town for good food everyday - 10 bucks or so each way.
sample_comments.room_type: Deluxe Room, 1 King Size Bed

sample_comments.title: A nice hotel!
sample_comments.text:
Positives: The facilities of this hotel are absolutely beautiful. Stunning pools, great restaurants, and a great private beach that is good for swimming at high tide. The staff were extremely friendly and helpful. The bed was super comfortable. Even our "garden" room had a small view of the ocean :) Panwa is quiet and away from the hectic chaos of Patong! 
Negatives: to the left of the beach, there is a port with some ugly cranes and container ships. The rooms are a bit basic and could use some more beautiful Thailand touches. 

The facilities felt 5*, the rooms were more like 3.5 or 4*
sample_comments.response:
Dear Ms. Aria,

Thank you for sharing your feedback with us. We're delighted to hear that you enjoyed our facilities, including the stunning pools, great restaurants, and private beach. It's wonderful to know that our staff's friendliness and the comfort of the bed contributed to a pleasant stay.

We appreciate your comments regarding the view from the beach and the room décor. Your feedback is valuable, and we will certainly take it into account as we continue to enhance our guest experience. 

Thank you again for choosing stay with us. We hope to have the pleasure of welcoming you back in the future.

Warm regards,
Katekanok Suebsak
Guest Experience Manager

sample_comments.title: A peaceful, beautifully maintained resort with exceptional service, outstanding food and views
sample_comments.positives:
The Pullman Phuket Panwa Beach Resort was absolutely brilliant. The hotel is very well maintained, with beautifully kept grounds that feel calm, clean and thoughtfully looked after. The pool and private beach were fantastic --- both relaxing and perfectly maintained, making it easy to unwind throughout the stay.

The inclusive breakfast was exceptional, with a wide selection of fresh fruits, an impressive range of vegan options, and made-to-order egg dishes. The staff were also more than happy to cater to special requests, which made breakfast feel both generous and personal.

What truly stood out was the staff --- everyone was incredibly kind, welcoming, and genuinely hospitable, creating a warm and relaxed atmosphere from start to finish.

The on-site restaurant, Tamarind, was outstanding. The food quality was excellent and felt like a destination restaurant in its own right. Combined with the breathtaking, calming views across the water, the setting made every meal feel special.

Overall, a wonderful stay in a peaceful location with beautiful views, great food, and exceptional service. Highly recommended.

sample_comments.title: Amazing resort set up with private beach, a bit pricey for Asian travelers though
sample_comments.positives: The location is amazing, where the highlight is the private beach. Villas and rooms are in less than 2 minutes distance from the restaurants, pool. Breakfast was amazing with lots of options and staff was extremely friendly and helpful. I would definitely go again.
sample_comments.negatives: No much to do outside of the resort, unless you go to Phuket Old town. The rooms are comfy, but a bit old. In some cases they need a slight renovation. For example there are marks on the walls, especially from dead inspects and paint is pilling off from the windows frames. Funnily enough, hot water was taking some time to flow in the shower (up to 3 minutes). Once it was running though, it was very hot. The majority of the week days the pool bar (Edge) closes at 20:00, which is a bit too early if you want to have a drink. Another slightly negative aspect is the prices for food and drinks. For US / European travelers, where the currencies are stronger, the prices can be considered "normal", but for someone living in Asia, it's a bit pricey compared to what is offered on food / drinks, but especially on spa treatments. A massage in the hotel will cost you up to 5x the price you will pay in Phuket old town.

The service at this hotel has not changed even though the Radisson Blu has changed under a different group. There were some issue with the room they assigned to us on the first night and the following day, the duty manager rang us to let us know they will provide us another room and this was done in a professional manner.

The only thing that has changed from our last stay last year was the pool side bar prices has changed dramatically - the food prices has increased dramatically, therefore we decided to eat elsewhere most days where as last year we ate our meals inside the hotel on most days.

sample_comments.title: A comfortable and stylish hotel
sample_comments.text: We had a very enjoyable stay at the Radisson Blu. The location Is beautiful and the hotel has a relaxed resort feel. We were upgraded to a poolside villa which was great - the room was spacious, clean and very well furnished with attention to detail, such as a coffee machine. The staff were very helpful and friendly although we did feel that they were shortstaffed as service was not always prompt. The food was great - tasty and generally pretty good value for a 5 star hotel. There was plenty to do if you didn't want to go out including exercise classes, kids club, DVDs to borrow and use of water sport equipment. Our only disappointment was the condition of the beach - there was a lot of litter at one end of the beach and also some along the beach. I was up early and watched the clean up and noticed that part of the rubbish was being dumped rather than being removed. I spoke to the hotel ambassador halfway through the stay but nothing was done whilst we were still there. I would expect better of a 5 start hotel, especially as this is such an easy thing to do.

sample_comments.title: Great location for a get away from the crowd hotel
sample_comments.text: The staff was friendly, speaking correct english. The on-site transportation booking was a a great option even if not necessarly the cheapest one. The sea-view room upgrade was great, but still close to the breakfast area, the restaurants or the lobby. The beach/sea is not the best in Phuket because of the important low tide/high tide difference but the swimming pool was great enough to compensate. We rented a long tail boat to travel to several nearby deserted islands and this was worth the money. We tried several front beach/pier restaurant, about 10mn walk from the hotel, and most of them were great. The convenience store in front of the hotel is perfect for small daily use needs. This was a great service/value deal. We would not hesitate to book there again.
sample_comments.positives: The staff was friendly, the hotel's restaurant were great, the nearby pier was good for more local restaurant and food options.

sample_comments.title: Excellent staff!
sample_comments.text: All good!
sample_comments.positives: Staff, pool, activities

sample_comments.title: memorable stay at a beautiful romantic hotel.
sample_comments.text: The stay was extremely comfortable. I enjoyed every minute of it. The day beds 'in'the pool - luxury! The beach is so-so. It was low tide on day 2 so not much of beach in fact. The pool bar is amazing. The food is really good and worth every penny. Huge ass portions :)
sample_comments.positives: pool, beach, staff

sample_comments.title: Very good Hotel! Beach is not for beach lovers
sample_comments.text: The hotel is very nice! The food is not the best. The restaurants are not very fast with the food, and they are expensive for what it is. But amazing swimming pool view to the see. Nice beach to take a walk, but not to have a swim or pass all day.
sample_comments.positives: View, Large Rooms and location

sample_comments.title: Very nice hotel away from the hustle and bustle
sample_comments.text: The Radisson Blu is a fantastic hotel away from the hustle and bustle of places like Patong, the facilities are excellent (we are a newlywed couple), including the pools which are very large and have a good view over the beach, the bar is awesome, and the fitness centre well equipped, there is a good kids club to keep the little ones busy during the day also.
sample_comments.positives: The villas are fantastic, the pools are great, staff are very friendly

sample_comments.title: Excellent. Despite renovation, we had a clean room
sample_comments.positives: Excellent. Despite renovation, we had a clean room, very limited disruptions in main areas and impressive internet speed for free unlimited usage

sample_comments.title: Great Hotel with a very accomadting staff.
sample_comments.text: hotel had a great breakfast buffet, i think the dinner buffet where a bit pricey. hotel a bit secluded, not much outside the hotel. the pools where vewry nice but the beach area had much to be desired, also lacking in water sports. it is a great place to relax.

sample_comments.title: nice ssa view room and comfort but little far away
sample_comments.text: Hotel is little far away but if you have car, would solve this problem. Retaurant for breakfast is relatively small. get up early for it avoiding lining up. Nice swimming pools but the beach is not suitable for swimming.

sample_comments.title: Great location and friendly staff
sample_comments.text: it`s a great hotel with amazing facilities: 2 swimming pools and ample sun deck lounges for guests to chill out. view from the restaurant overlooking the sea is just perfect at any time of the day. food is great and staff are very friendly. room is spacious, clean and the balcony is just perfect for some reading.
sample_comments.positives: spacious room, view from the room overlooking the sea

sample_comments.title: Nice ocean view, Nice swimming pool,
sample_comments.text: We arrived late a bit no time to enjoy the hotel much, But all facilities quite good. Swimming pools are nice.
